defaults.theme: bright cherry red (#e63946) and clean white
defaults.style: Modern flat 2D vector illustration, bold rounded shapes, thick clean outlines, Duolingo-style gamified app icon, centered subject, transparent background, no text unless requested

assets.name: motionbloom_logo
assets.prompt: App logo for 'MotionBloom', a hand-tremor health app. A stylized open hand merging into a blooming flower, formed from smooth flowing motion lines. Bright cherry red (#e63946) and white. Modern minimalist flat vector mark, bold rounded geometry, transparent background, centered, no text.

assets.name: bloom_idle
assets.prompt: Mascot character 'Bloom' for a health app: a friendly cartoon hand-flower creature with a calm curious smile, standing neutral. Bright cherry red (#e63946) and white, thick rounded outlines, flat 2D vector, Duolingo style, centered, transparent background.

assets.name: bloom_wave
assets.prompt: Mascot 'Bloom' waving hello with a big warm smile, welcoming pose, one arm raised. Bright cherry red (#e63946) and white, thick rounded outlines, flat 2D vector, Duolingo style, centered, transparent background.

assets.name: bloom_cheer
assets.prompt: Mascot 'Bloom' celebrating, jumping with both arms up, excited happy face, small sparkles around it. Bright cherry red (#e63946) and white, thick rounded outlines, flat 2D vector, Duolingo style, centered, transparent background.

assets.name: bloom_sad
assets.prompt: Mascot 'Bloom' looking gently sad and supportive, slight frown, hand to chest, empathetic. Bright cherry red (#e63946) and white, thick rounded outlines, flat 2D vector, Duolingo style, centered, transparent background.

assets.name: bloom_analyzing
assets.prompt: Mascot 'Bloom' thinking and focused, one hand on chin, concentrating, subtle motion lines. Bright cherry red (#e63946) and white, thick rounded outlines, flat 2D vector, Duolingo style, centered, transparent background.

assets.name: streak_flame
assets.prompt: A bold rounded flame icon for a daily-streak badge. Bright cherry red (#e63946) with white highlight. Flat 2D vector, thick clean outline, centered, transparent background, no text.

assets.name: xp_gem
assets.prompt: A faceted shiny gem icon for an XP/points badge. Cherry red (#e63946) with white sparkle highlights. Flat 2D vector, thick clean outline, centered, transparent background, no text.

assets.name: heart
assets.prompt: A plump rounded heart icon for a lives/health counter. Bright cherry red (#e63946) with subtle white highlight. Flat 2D vector, thick clean outline, centered, transparent background, no text.

assets.name: ex_free
assets.prompt: A waving open hand icon representing a free-form hand check. Cherry red (#e63946) and white, flat 2D vector, thick rounded outline, centered, transparent background, no text.

assets.name: ex_nose
assets.prompt: A simple icon of a fingertip touching the tip of a nose, side profile, representing an intention-tremor test. Cherry red (#e63946) and white, flat 2D vector, thick rounded outline, centered, transparent background, no text.

assets.name: ex_head
assets.prompt: A simple icon of a hand resting on top of a head, representing a scratch-head kinetic test. Cherry red (#e63946) and white, flat 2D vector, thick rounded outline, centered, transparent background, no text.

assets.name: ex_hold
assets.prompt: A simple icon of a hand holding a cup out in front, representing a postural-tremor hold test. Cherry red (#e63946) and white, flat 2D vector, thick rounded outline, centered, transparent background, no text.

assets.name: ui_camera
assets.prompt: A minimalist camera icon. Cherry red (#e63946) and white, flat 2D vector, thick rounded outline, centered, transparent background, no text.

assets.name: ui_reports
assets.prompt: A minimalist bar-chart report icon. Cherry red (#e63946) and white, flat 2D vector, thick rounded outline, centered, transparent background, no text.
